rca.root_cause: Expired TLS certificate on the payment-api endpoint (Ingress/Load Balancer), causing TLS handshake failures and blocking secure client connections.
recommendation: Immediately renew/replace the TLS certificate (e.g., via cert-manager renew or updating the Ingress/ACM certificate Secret), ensure the Ingress/controller reloads the new cert, and verify with openssl s_client and application smoke tests.

Implement automated certificate lifecycle management and early expiry alerts (e.g., cert-manager with ACME auto-renewal and Prometheus alerts at 30/14/7/3 days), plus a periodic TLS handshake monitor to detect failures before impact.
